# gitagotchi pixel sprites · 50 species · 48x18 palette-indexed grids
# letters: O body · D outline · W light · K eyes/dark · P accent · R blush · S shade
# body palette derives from linguist color; blink = eye rows K->D (derived)
# GENERATED by tools/extract-sprites.sh — edit the gallery, not this file

### frog  (Bopo · linguist Shell #89e051)
:frame idle_1

.......DDDDOOOWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWOOSDDDD.......

.......DDDDD..DDOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOSDD..DDDDD.......

### crab  (Kema · linguist Scala #c22d40)
:frame idle_1
................................................
................................................
..................OS........OS..................
................DDKKDD....DDKKDD................
...DDDDDD.........OOO......OOS.........DDDDDD...
..DDDOODDDD....DDDOOOOOOOOOOOODDD....DDDDOODDD..
..DDDOOOOSDD..DDDOOOOOOOOOOOOOODDD..DDOOOOSDDD..
...DDDOSDDDDDDDOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOODDDDDDDOSDDD...
........DDDOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOODDD........
........DDOORROOOOOOOOKKKKOOOOOOOORROSDD........
........DDDOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOSDDD........
..........DDDOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOSDDD..........
.......DDDOSDD..DDOSDD....DDOSDD..DDOODDD.......
......DDOSDDD...DDOSDD....DDOSDD...DDDOSDD......
......DDDDD......DDDDD....DDDDD......DDDDD......
................................................
................................................
................................................
:frame idle_2
................................................
................................................
..................OS........OS..................
................DDKKDD....DDKKDD................
.DDDDDD...........OOO......OOS...........DDDDDD.
DDDOODDDD......DDDOOOOOOOOOOOODDD......DDDDOODDD
DDDOOOOSDDD..DDDDOOOOOOOOOOOOOODDDD..DDDOOOOSDDD
.DDDOSDDDDDDDDDOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOODDDDDDDDDOSDDD.
